description: Composition Red printed top made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with a slit neckline, short sleeves with elasticated cuffs, buttoned chest placket, pin-tucks on either sides of the placket, elasticated at the waist on both sides and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Designed for that casual feminine look, this navy blue printed top looks stylish with the pin-tucks and elasticated cuffs while the elasticated waist and curved hem adds to the smart look. Team this with jeans or skirts and ballerina flats or floaters for a cool casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
